message:
fix(mvcc): correct policy-switch delta calculation and collect all merge variants

The policy-switch evidence event computed delta as strict-merge regardless
of which direction the switch went. Fix to compute loss_old and loss_new
based on the actual previous and new effective policies, so delta is
always positive when the switch reduces expected loss.

Replace single last_merge_variant string with a BTreeSet collecting all
distinct merge proof variants used across blocks in a single commit.
The emitted proof_variant field now shows "AppendOnly+IndependentKeys"
instead of just the last variant processed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
